title: orthiopteris campylura var. caudata
intro: Orthiopteris campylura var. caudata, also known as the Australian strap fern, is a variety of the Orthiopteris campylura plant, a type of fern native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orthiopteris campylura var. caudata include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in water or using them in a topical ointment, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
